name: HWP_PRED_ATTR_REASONS_V
query: SELECT hdmr.enterprise_id, hdmr.process_id, hdmr.person_id, hdmr.assignment_id, hab.attr_code attr_code, hab.attr_name attribute_name, hdmr.attr_value attribute_value, decode(hl_units.lookup_code,'PCT','%',hl_units.meaning) attribute_unit, hab.data_type, hdmr.pred_weight weight, hdmr.pred_weight_pct * SIGN(hdmr.pred_weight) weight_pct, dense_rank() over(partition BY assignment_id,SIGN(pred_weight) order by ABS(pred_weight) DESC,hab.attr_code ) precedence_order, DECODE(SIGN(pred_weight),1,'LEAVING','STAYING') reason_type FROM hwp_data_mining_process hdmp, hwp_data_mining_reasons hdmr, hwp_attributes_vl hab, hr_lookups hl_units WHERE hdmp.model_code = 'HWP_ATTR_MODEL' AND hdmr.process_id = hdmp.process_id AND hab.attr_code = hdmr.attr_code AND hab.attr_unit = hl_units.lookup_code(+) AND hl_units.lookup_type(+) = 'HWP_ATTR_UNITS'
